features.name: task with named begin block in while loop
features.description: Code should include a task containing a named begin block (begin : NAME) inside a while loop

features.name: duplicate named block in different tasks
features.description: Code should include two different tasks that each contain a named begin block with the same name

features.name: multiple instantiations of tasks with duplicate named blocks
features.description: Code should include multiple instantiations of tasks that contain identically-named begin blocks, creating a false duplicate declaration
